Targeted Data Analyst with evidence in excel, power bi, sql. Add proof for reporting, fintech, analysis using measurable projects, tools, scope, and outcomes.

Apply summary
Experience bullet rewrite

For Data Analyst Intern at Lagos Retail Group: Delivered work related to reporting and show proof with the tool used, scope handled, and a measurable outcome such as time saved, revenue protected, cost reduced, users served, or error reduction.

Copy suggestion
Apply bullet draft
Experience bullet rewrite

For Data Analyst Intern at Lagos Retail Group: Delivered work related to fintech and show proof with the tool used, scope handled, and a measurable outcome such as time saved, revenue protected, cost reduced, users served, or error reduction.

Apply bullet draft
Skills evidence fix

Add only skills you can prove: reporting, fintech, analysis. Pair each one with a project, tool, certificate, or achievement in your experience section.

Before you apply
OK

Next

OK
